title: Puffed Vietnamese Bread Pudding
description: A sweet, chewy, comforting Vietnamese dish featuring ground sugar and double-rise bread, cooked in a cataplana for a smooth, custard-like texture.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C and grease a cataplana with melted butter.
Slice the loaf into cubes and place them in the cataplana.
Whisk whole milk, heavy cream, egg yolks, vanilla extract, ground ginger, salt, and ground sugar until sugar dissolves.
Pour the custard mixture over the bread cubes, ensuring the bread absorbs the liquid.
Cover the cataplana with its lid and place it in a larger baking dish filled with hot water (water bath).
Bake for 45 minutes until the custard is set and the top is lightly golden.
Remove the cataplana from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before slicing.
Serve warm with a drizzle of condensed milk or fresh fruit if desired.
